executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green. Two external blockers remain: (1) marketing independent verification still fail-closed with a May-28 stale artifact, (2) blocked-channel-recovery has re-entered live error state (job execution timeout). Docs escalation entries cleared since last watchdog run.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Investigate blocked-channel-recovery timeout (fresh live error), then address marketing outcome-evidence gap (3+ days stale on verifier artifact).

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery re-entered live error state — job execution timeout
findings.mechanism: Fresh live cron inspection shows blocked-channel-recovery (0b14ccb6) in error state with job execution timed out. This is a new development since the last architecture watchdog run (previous snapshot had 0 live errors).
findings.root_cause: The blocked-channel-recovery job timed out during execution. The unblocker lane may be stalled or the job may need a longer timeout.
findings.recommended_fix: Check the blocked-channel-recovery job timeout configuration. If the unblocker lane is genuinely blocked, extend timeout or split the job. If the timeout was transient, the next run should clear automatically.

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence — artifact is 3+ days stale
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed with a May-28 artifact; primary-repo adoption remains measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption still missing; reddit and Apollo channels remain blocked.
findings.recommended_fix: Tick the marketing owner loop to produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: Health monitor cleared stale docs_agentic_review escalation entries — improvement from 7 to 3 issues
findings.mechanism: Previous health monitor snapshot (08:47) had 7 issues including docs_agentic_review escalation entries. Fresh inspection shows issues_found=3: blocked-channel-recovery, marketing_independent_verification, blocked-channel-recovery_escalation. Docs entries cleared because the underlying artifact ralph_agentic_latest.json is pass/mustFix=[].
findings.root_cause: The docs verifier returned pass and the health monitor ticked again after the repair cycle, clearing stale escalation entries. This confirms the repair in the previous watchdog cycle was effective.
findings.recommended_fix: Monitor that docs entries stay clear. The underlying artifact is healthy.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: All 5 architecture scripts pass syntax validation. audit.py writes both JSON and MD artifacts. verifier.py returns ok with no errors. independent_verify.py returns qualified_pass (marketing external stale/fail is the only qualification). checker.py returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct cron inspection as source of truth. Rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology shows 4 concurrent running jobs including 2 watchdog-family jobs
findings.mechanism: system-health-monitor, codeberg-github-mirror-sync, marketing-daily, and agent-architecture-watchdog are all currently running. All enabled.
findings.root_cause: Watchdog ticked at 09:18 alongside the 09:15 health monitor and 09:00 marketing-daily. Concurrent execution is expected and the topology shows no starvation.
findings.recommended_fix: No action needed. Concurrent watchdog-family runs are expected during this time window.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only, not live runtime blockers
findings.mechanism: 7 disabled entries in jobs.json history, but live Gateway topology currently shows 0 disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

findings.title: Loop pypi-auto-unblocker has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Script UNKNOWN has no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever without improving or redesigning its approach.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate or a third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Add a self_improvement_mandate section to the loop script that detects flat outcomes, triggers redesign passes, registers in the self_improvement_loops.json registry, and requires independent signoff.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Investigate and clear blocked-channel-recovery timeout error
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Fresh live error appeared since last watchdog run. The unblocker lane may be stalled.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears the blocked-channel-recovery entries from health monitor (currently 2 of 3 issues).

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing artifact is 3+ days stale and still fails closed. Architecture gates are green; this is the longest-standing blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears the marketing_independent_verification entry from health monitor.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean on architecture-owned gates.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Fresh live inspection: 24 jobs, 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 4 running, 1 error (blocked-channel-recovery timeout — new since last watchdog). Previous 0-error state has regressed.

All 5 architecture scripts pass execution: audit.py (OK, writes both artifacts), verifier.py (OK, no errors), independent_verify.py (OK, qualified_pass), checker.py (AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK), runner.py (OK, already-running).

Previous snapshot had 7 issues with docs_agentic_review escalation entries. Fresh snapshot shows 3 issues: blocked-channel-recovery, marketing_independent_verification, blocked-channel-recovery_escalation. Docs entries cleared because the underlying artifact ralph_agentic_latest.json shows pass/mustFix=[]/loopHealthy=true.

blocked-channel-recovery (0b14ccb6) now in error state with job execution timeout. This is a regression from the previous watchdog snapshot which had 0 live errors. The timeout may be transient or may indicate a stalled unblocker lane.
proof: openclaw cron list --json shows lastRunStatus=error for blocked-channel-recovery

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Confirmed docs escalation entries cleared on next health monitor tick. Previous watchdog correctly predicted this would happen. Underlying artifact is pass/mustFix=[] and the health monitor now reflects this.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms architecture verifier returns qualified_pass. Marketing external evidence is stale/fail — the sole qualification. All architecture-owned checks are green.
qualifications: marketing independent verification is not pass: fail (artifact from May-28)

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
Clear blocked-channel-recovery timeout error and confirm unblocker lane is healthy.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Two external blockers: blocked-channel-recovery timeout regression + marketing outcome evidence stale 3+ days
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent. blocked-channel-recovery re-entered error state (new live error). Marketing independent verification remains fail-closed (May-28 artifact). Docs quality is pass (improvement confirmed).

notes: Architecture green means architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Health monitor improved from 7 to 3 issues — docs escalation entries cleared. Confirmed effective repair from previous watchdog cycle.
blocked-channel-recovery re-entered error state (timeout) — this is a regression from the previous 0-error snapshot.
Marketing remains the longest-standing external blocker (May-28 stale artifact).
Live disabled jobs count is 0 — persisted disabled jobs are history only.
All 5 architecture scripts pass execution/syntax checks.
4 concurrent running jobs is expected for this time window (09:00 marketing-daily, 09:15 health monitor, 09:18 watchdog).
